description: BLAKE2b-keyed derivation of (link_id, wrapping_key) from a 32-byte link secret.

serverBoundOutputs.name: linkId
serverBoundOutputs.reason: Server-visible lookup token; derived from secret never sent to server.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: linkSecret
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: Link secret lives in the URL fragment and must never reach the server.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: wrappingKey
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: Derived wrapping key must stay client-side; equivalent to the link secret.
